summary: Tested AI-powered photo transformation feature during minting process. Backend API tests (12/12 passed) verify /api/ai-transform/status, /api/ai-transform/generate, and /api/ai-transform/reset endpoints. Frontend UI testing confirmed 3-step mint flow (Upload → Transform → Confirm) with all required elements present including data-testid attributes.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: AIPhotoTransform.jsx: Well-structured component with proper state management for generations remaining counter
MintPhotoDialog: Correctly implements 3-step flow (upload/transform/confirm) with state reset on dialog close
Backend ai_photo_transform.py: Proper validation of image data, prompt length, and generation limits
Reset on mint success: minting_routes.py correctly calls on_mint_success() to reset transform counter after successful mint
seed_data_creation: JWT token created for test user authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI photo transformation feature fully tested. Backend APIs work correctly. Frontend 3-step mint flow verified. The 'Next: AI Transform' button is correctly disabled until an image is uploaded. Generation counter resets after successful mint.

POST /api/ai-transform/generate.details: Validates prompt (min 3 chars), image base64, num_variations (1-4). Returns variations array and updated generations_remaining

authentication.details: All endpoints correctly require authentication (401 for unauthenticated requests)

step_2_transform.details: AIPhotoTransform component with prompt input, generate button, skip button, example prompts, generations counter

step_3_confirm.details: Shows preview (original or transformed), name, visibility, mint cost, back button, mint button

validation.details: Next button correctly disabled until image is uploaded and name is entered

note: AI generation takes 30-60 seconds per image. The feature uses OpenAI GPT Image 1 via Emergent LLM Key. Max 3 generations per mint session, counter resets after successful mint.
